title: Syphon Pump, Preciva Fuel Petrol Suction Extractor Pumping Tool, 2m All Rubber Oil Water Transfer Siphon Pumpers, Automotive Brake Fluid Syphoning Hose Kit with 2 Caps for Cars, Fish Tanks
features: 📌𝗔𝗹𝗹-𝗥𝘂𝗯𝗯𝗲𝗿 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗡𝗼 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀 ---- Engineered for long-lasting use, Preciva siphon pump is made entirely of high-quality rubber, unlike cheaper PVC models. This durable material resists oil and bending, also the equipped secure single-ear clamp ensures a leak-free experience.

📌𝗚𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝗦𝗶𝘇𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝘁𝘆 ---- Featuring the 2-meter hose available, this fuel syphon pump includes a hose of 2 meters, internal diameter: 14mm, outer diameter: 21mm. It delivers up to 10 liters per minute, making it effortless to fill or empty large containers. Suitable for all liquids, water, diesel, gasoline, AdBlue, and oil.
📌𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗨𝘀𝗲 ---- Designed for convenience, this pump requires no manual siphoning. Simply press the hand pump a few times to start the flow, saving you time and effort.
📌𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗱𝘆-𝘁𝗼-𝗨𝘀𝗲 ---- Arriving fully assembled, this fuel transfer pump is ready for immediate use. The included manual will guide you through the initial setup, ensuring a hassle-free start.

📌𝗧𝗵𝗼𝘂𝗴𝗵𝘁𝗳𝘂𝗹 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀 ---- To keep the pump hose clean and free from debris, Preciva has included two rubber hose caps. These caps protect the hose from dust and contaminants, making it ideal for various applications such as vehicles, boats, and aquariums.
description: Product Description Thank You for Choosing Preciva Heavy Duty Siphon Pump ！ Hose Length： 141cm + 60cm Inside Diameter： 14mm Outside Diameter：21mm Wall Thickness： 3mm Built-in Check Valve to Prevent Liquid Backflow Practical Rubber Plug After using the siphon pump, residual oil can remain in the hose. If not sealed, this oil can leak and create a mess, making cleanup difficult. To address this, we've included a practical rubber plug to securely close the hose ends and prevent leaks, ensuring a hassle-free cleanup experience. Widely Application Note: 1.Outlet pipe must be long, target container lower (height = speed). 2.Insert inlet pipe fully into source and Place outlet in target . The outlet end must be lower than the inlet end. 3.Press airbag/piston firmly 3–5 times (smooth movements). Why does the siphon effect not work? During use, the siphon pump needs to be kept in a vertical position to avoid foreign objects or other external interference, which may affect the siphon effect. The height of source tank must be HIGHER than the target container. Not enough suction power?Pressing without suction? Trying the answer1 steps, if still not, Maybe the airbag is ruptured/leaked. You can contact the after-sales customer to ask for Replace the pump body or sealing ring.
